verses.text: We have such a high priest, 'set on the right hand of the throne,' a minister of 'the true tabernacle, which the Lord pitched.' Heavenly priest. Christ serves in the real sanctuary above.
We have such a high priest, 'set on the right hand of the throne,' a minister of 'the true tabernacle, which the Lord pitched.' Heavenly priest. Christ serves in the real sanctuary above.
We have such a high priest, 'set on the right hand of the throne,' a minister of 'the true tabernacle, which the Lord pitched.' Heavenly priest. Christ serves in the real sanctuary above.
He has 'a more excellent ministry,' the mediator of 'a better covenant... established upon better promises.' Better covenant. His ministry surpasses the shadows of the law.
He has 'a more excellent ministry,' the mediator of 'a better covenant... established upon better promises.' Better covenant. His ministry surpasses the shadows of the law.
He has 'a more excellent ministry,' the mediator of 'a better covenant... established upon better promises.' Better covenant. His ministry surpasses the shadows of the law.
If the first covenant had been faultless, no second sought; but God promises 'a new covenant,' not like the old they broke. New covenant. The old failed through man; God brings a better.
If the first covenant had been faultless, no second sought; but God promises 'a new covenant,' not like the old they broke. New covenant. The old failed through man; God brings a better.
If the first covenant had been faultless, no second sought; but God promises 'a new covenant,' not like the old they broke. New covenant. The old failed through man; God brings a better.

'I will put my laws into their mind'; 'I will be... their God,' remembering their sins no more. In saying 'new,' He makes the first old. Written within. God's new covenant changes the heart and forgives fully.
